privacy_boundary: Derived and redacted public projection. Private memories, local paths, raw transcripts, credentials, contacts, device state, and third-party context are excluded.

cases.problem_class: Memory consolidation dry-run accepted an explicit source path outside the intended boundary.
cases.repair: Constrain explicit sources to the local run directory and validate generated consolidation records before trust.
cases.human_role: The observer returned a bounded critique. The front-stage operator accepted it, patched the implementation, and reran validation.
validation: Dry-run passes for default bounded discovery.
No unattended apply or durable memory write is approved.
anti_signals: A future consolidation path writes durable memory without a separate review.
A source-boundary failure becomes a warning rather than a hard block.
cases.private_boundary: Exact private receipt paths and internal memory IDs are not public.
cases.next_experiment: Add a private-to-public redaction gate before publishing future consolidation cases.

cases.problem_class: Stale task next expected events appeared as isolated backlog noise.
cases.repair: Project repair-needed events into grouped patterns and create bounded repair plans instead of mutating source tasks silently.
cases.human_role: This is a planning case, not an automatic mutation. A later repair receipt is required before source state changes.
validation: Scanner writes only its own intermediate events and receipts.
Digest groups repair-needed events by repair class.
Repair plans require a later receipt before source mutation.
anti_signals: Owner-facing notification volume rises with event volume.
Repair plans mutate source state without receipts.
cases.private_boundary: Raw task records and dashboard payloads remain private unless separately redacted.
cases.next_experiment: Add a safe public summary generator for repair-plan outcomes.

cases.problem_class: Fleet rule sync command payload exceeded a conservative remote command parameter limit.
cases.repair: Stage the large bridge artifact in small chunks and keep the main bootstrap command below the parameter limit.
cases.human_role: The front-stage operator executed the rollout, classified a network-environment blocker separately from the payload blocker, and retried the failed region.
validation: Dry run renders every parameter file below the configured limit.
Live rollout restarts the cloud fleet poller after clearing malformed proxy environment variables for the command process.
One failed region succeeds after a scoped retry.
Duplicate backlog records close against a shared repair receipt.
anti_signals: Future rule sync fails on parameter size again.
A network proxy failure is misdiagnosed as a payload failure.
A partial rollout is reported as complete without per-node status.
cases.private_boundary: Provider account identifiers, private run artifacts, and local machine paths are not public.
cases.next_experiment: Teach the rollout runner to sanitize network proxy variables or report proxy misconfiguration before sending commands.
